name: Full Project Audit
description: Loyihaning to'liq audit - barcha agentlar ishga tushadi

then.prompt: To'liq loyiha audit qil: 1) @code-reviewer kod sifati, 2) @security-auditor xavfsizlik, 3) @performance-optimizer performance, 4) @test-coverage-analyzer test coverage, 5) @database-optimizer database (agar mavjud bo'lsa), 6) @documentation-writer docs to'liqligi. Har biridan qisqacha hisobot ber.
